creator: richterphilipp.pops@gmail.com
text:
Hi, the latest available version of minidlna in FreeBSD is 1.1.5 which dates back to 2015. The latest release is 1.2.0 https://sourceforge.net/projects/minidlna/files/minidlna/1.2.0/

I was wondering if there was anything holding back the update?

Thank you.
